mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ow_member(id, password, nickname, name, phone, email) VALUES(#{id}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email})
mapper.select: SELECT id, password, nickname, name, phone, email, role, grade_point, profile_img, status, TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS reg_date, TO_CHAR(update_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS update_date FROM ow_member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ow_member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ow_member WHERE nickname = #{nickname}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ow_member WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_member SET nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, update_date = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ow_member SET password = #{password}, update_date = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname, name, email, role, status, grade_point, TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS reg_date FROM ow_member ORDER BY reg_date DESC, id
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_member SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ow_member SET role = #{role} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ow_member SET profile_img = #{profileImg} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ow_member SET nickname_changed = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, password, nickname, name, phone, email, role, grade_point, profile_img, status, provider, provider_id, TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS reg_date, TO_CHAR(update_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS update_date FROM ow_member WHERE provider = #{provider} AND provider_id = #{providerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ow_member(id, nickname, name, email, provider, provider_id) VALUES(#{id}, #{nickname}, #{name}, #{email}, #{provider}, #{providerId})
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_member SET face_descriptor = #{faceDescriptor} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname, face_descriptor FROM ow_member WHERE face_descriptor IS NOT NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ow_member WHERE id = #{id} AND face_descriptor IS NOT NULL
